title: John Mauldin
html:
Stub. Texas-based investment newsletter author / economist. Cited by the Grants Pass broker in 2019 03 14 voice memo 1625 as his primary information edge ("John Malden") for calling the 2007 gold-fund move; Yahir himself name-drops "John Malden economics" in 2020 01 02 voice memo 0015 as part of his 2019 reading list. A node in the financial freedom cluster.

First mentioned in 2019 03 14 voice memo 1625.

Source summaries

  • 2019 03 14 voice memo 1625 — broker cites Mauldin newsletter for the 2007 pre-crash gold call
  • 2020 01 02 voice memo 0015 — Yahir's own time-capsule recording lists Mauldin as part of his reading edge

related.label: Investing 101 with a longtime broker — Mar 14 2019 conversation
Time-capsule recording — Jan 2 2020 'recording with my life'
